description: Los Mexicles is a Mexican and Mexican-American gang founded in 1987 in Ciudad Juárez, Chihuahua. It is an armed wing of the Sinaloa Cartel in the border region, involved in murder, extortion, drug trafficking, kidnapping, and vehicle theft. The gang operates primarily in several Mexican states and parts of Texas, and is known for using Nahuatl messages in U.S. prisons. Its members are mostly deportees or descendants of Mexicans, and leaving the gang is punishable by death.

country_links.evidence_quote: El grupo usualmente usa mensajes en Nahuatl para comunicarse en prisiones estadounidenses... además de que el grueso de la organización se registra en cárceles de los E.U.
country_links.context: Los Mexicles operates in U.S. prisons, using Nahuatl to communicate, and the group is composed of deportees or descendants of Mexicans in the U.S.
